Metadata.homeDescription: Personalized digital invitations for weddings and celebrations in Portugal, with online RSVP, maps, music, gallery and simple WhatsApp sharing.

Landing.heroBody: We design elegant, personal invitations that are easy to share, with RSVP, map, music and every detail guests need for the big day.
Landing.defaultWhatsappMessage: Hello! I would like to request a quote for a Brindeal digital invitation.
Landing.galleryEmpty: No featured invitations in this category yet.
Landing.footerDescription: Personal, elegant digital invitations made with care in Lisbon.
Landing.footerCopyright: © 2026 Brindeal Studio · Made with care in Lisbon

LandingContact.body: Tell us the date, style and what you already imagine. We reply with a clear proposal the same day, with no commitment.
LandingContact.name: Name
LandingContact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us the style, venue or any important detail.

LandingTypes.title: Every celebration has its tone
LandingTypes.body: From save the date to the wedding, we adapt the text, rhythm and details so the invitation feels made for your story.
LandingTypes.typeQuestion: Hello! I would like to know more about {type}.

saveTheDate.title: Save The Date
saveTheDate.text: Announce the date with lightness, a countdown and a first glimpse of what is coming.

wedding.title: Wedding
wedding.text: The complete invitation for the big day: story, schedule, RSVP, map, music and useful details in one place.

engagement.title: Engagement
engagement.text: An intimate invitation to gather the right people and mark the start of this new chapter.

LandingGallery.title: Examples with soul
LandingGallery.body: Every invitation begins with a conversation: your photos, your style, the words you want guests to remember.
LandingGallery.empty: No featured invitations in this category yet.

LandingProcess.title: We guide. You approve.
LandingProcess.body: We help turn loose ideas into an invitation ready to send, without leaving you lost between text, colors and technical decisions.
LandingProcess.closing: Ready to create something that truly feels yours?
steps: We talk about your event, the style you imagine and what you want guests to feel. You receive a clear proposal the same day.
We collect photos, texts and references. We design an invitation with your rhythm, colors and story.
You comment, we adjust and refine with you. Small changes are ready quickly, without complicating the process.
We put the invitation live, ready to share, with real-time RSVP in a private dashboard.
LandingProcess.previewMessageB: Perfect! I'll send a proposal today ✦

LandingFeatures.title: Beautiful to see. Simple to use.
LandingFeatures.body: Guests receive a clear link. You track confirmations, choices and messages without loose sheets or lost conversations.
LandingFeatures.rsvpBody: Guests confirm, choose their menu and leave a message. You follow everything in a private dashboard, synced by the minute.
LandingFeatures.musicText: The right soundtrack, at the right moment.
LandingFeatures.mapText: Directions, GPS and details to arrive stress-free.
LandingFeatures.guestsText: Table, personal link and companions always organized.
LandingFeatures.analyticsText: Know who opened, confirmed and replied.
LandingFeatures.languagesText: Portuguese, English and Spanish to welcome everyone well.
LandingFeatures.customText: Typography, colors and photos chosen for your day.

LandingLiveDemo.title: See how guests will open it
LandingLiveDemo.body: Explore real examples on a phone and feel how the experience reaches whoever receives the invitation.

LandingFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
LandingFaq.body: Everything you need to know before we start. Can't find the answer? We can talk on WhatsApp.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: Typically 3 to 5 business days after we receive photos and text. For close dates, we create express versions in 48h.

items.question: Can I use it for events beyond weddings?
items.answer: Yes. We adapt the experience for save the date, baptisms, engagements, birthdays and private celebrations.

items.question: How does RSVP work?
items.answer: Guests confirm directly in the invitation. You follow everything in a private dashboard, in real time.

items.question: Can I send it to individual guests?
items.answer: Yes. Each guest can receive a personalized link with names, table and specific details.

items.question: Can I edit after publishing?
items.answer: Yes. Text, schedule, map and detail adjustments can be updated after publishing.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: It depends on customization level, content and features. We send a clear proposal the same day.
